title: athyrium deltoidofrons
intro: Athyrium deltoidofrons is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae, commonly found in China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium deltoidofrons are attributed to its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Athyrium deltoidofrons can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments.
